ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted in discussions about depressing movies for its raw and heartbreaking depiction of grief and despair.

ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times for its bleak and existential themes that resonate with feelings of hopelessness.

ranked_movies.title: The Whale
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the context of films about deeply depressed and isolated protagonists.

ranked_movies.title: Lars and the Real Girl
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its sensitive portrayal of loneliness and mental health struggles, often discussed in depressive movie threads.

ranked_movies.title: Her
ranked_movies.reason: Brought up in discussions about loneliness and futility in modern relationships, contributing to its depressive tone.

ranked_movies.reason: While often seen as a comedy, it's recommended for its underlying themes of family dysfunction and personal despair.

ranked_movies.title: Old Yeller
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a classic example of a profoundly depressing film, especially in the 'most depressing movie from your country' thread.

ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as one of the most bleak and depressing films ever made, focusing on nuclear war aftermath.

ranked_movies.title: Angela's Ashes
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its relentless portrayal of poverty and despair, making it a top choice for depressing films.

ranked_movies.title: Belladonna of Sadness
ranked_movies.reason: Described as 'if depression was an animation,' highlighting its intense and artistic depiction of sorrow.

ranked_movies.reason: Often discussed for its dark and melancholic themes, resonating with audiences seeking films about misery.

ranked_movies.title: The Road
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the 'most depressing movie' thread for its post-apocalyptic hopelessness and grim narrative.

ranked_movies.title: Once Were Warriors
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a deeply depressing film from New Zealand, focusing on family trauma and societal issues.

ranked_movies.title: Wendy and Lucy
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its quiet and devastating portrayal of loneliness and economic struggle.

ranked_movies.title: Perfect Blue
ranked_movies.reason: Noted in depressive movie discussions for its psychological horror and themes of identity crisis.

ranked_movies.title: Schindler's List
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a film that is depressing from beginning to end due to its historical tragedy and emotional weight.

ranked_movies.title: Incendies
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a profoundly depressing film with a tragic and heart-wrenching narrative.
